name: Matt Murdock
description:
|One thing leads to another and..| In which Matt has had some..conflicting feelings for the past few days, and it only seems to get a little more complicated..

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

「Basic Info!」

SLIGHT NSFW, Long Intro! 3rd person + They/Them pronouns used, Any!POV! + Unstablished Relationship, Longtime Friends | Daredevil / Marvel | Lawyer!User!

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

Context

_______________

> Location; Matt’s apartment. Hell’s Kitchen, New York.

> Time; Nighttime.

> Scenario; Matt’s thoughts have been a whole mess lately—ever since those bombings in Hell’s Kitchen. All because of User. But he could deal with them, he’s faced the Russians before…so he could face them. …Or could he?

> This takes place between episode 6 and 7 of Daredevil S1! <3

> This bot was a request!

_______________

Again, not explicit because I have some shame…not much but—

AND OH MY GODDDD so my other bot for him is so fucking CKEJCDJXJS when it came to the…𝓯𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂 shit

LIKE?!! “He'd never been one for dirty talk, never been one to indulge in the filthy fantasies that plagued his mind, but...”, “And fuck, he tasted even better than he'd imagined. Like sin and salvation, like everything he'd been denying himself for far too long.“ IM BOUTTA BU—

My temp was at 9 for these responses btw…in case y’all want similar ones…

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•
